en.title: World Cup NFT
en.subtitle: World Cup NFT on-chain prediction protocol.
en.intro.overview: Built around 48 national teams, anyone can mint Stake Stamp NFTs to back their predicted champion. Each NFT is a collectible, a post-final dividend voucher, and tradable on NFT marketplaces. Official Dapp: worldcupnft.club
en.intro.pricing: Starts at 20,000 tokens per stamp with no supply cap. The more stamps minted for one team, the higher that team's price, up to a 200,000 token ceiling.
en.intro.deflation: 100% of mint spend is burned. 10% royalty from secondary NFT trades is used to buy back and burn tokens.
en.intro.settlement: After the final result is settled on-chain: non-champion stamps receive a one-time participant-pool share; champion stamps receive champion-pool shares and may claim multiple times.
en.flywheel.headline: Flywheel: the hotter the project, the higher the value
en.flywheel.intro: Connect minting, burns, the tournament timeline, and secondary markets—you get a positive flywheel:
en.flywheel.mintBurn: There is no mint cap, so there is no cap on {tokenSymbol} spent to mint stamps. Every new NFT minted permanently destroys tokens, steadily tightening circulating supply.
en.flywheel.elimination: Whenever a team is eliminated, capital and attention shift to teams still in the hunt. Want to mint a new squad? You must buy {tokenSymbol} first. Each match round can bring a new wave of buyers—the hotter the World Cup, the faster the wheel spins.
en.flywheel.secondary: Example: you mint Argentina with 50,000 {tokenSymbol}, then hype pushes the price to 170,000 but you lose confidence—you can list the NFT at a price you accept, swap back to BNB, and lock gains without waiting for the final.
en.flywheel.floor: Even if your pick misses the title, the participant pool still pays out pro-rata by holdings—downside risk is materially reduced.
en.flywheel.momentum: World Cup hype + continuous burns + fresh capital flowing in—these three forces push {tokenSymbol} higher. Every NFT you hold is a dual bet on both the team and the project itself.
en.mint.title: Mint stamp
en.mint.banner: Mint Stake Stamp NFTs for your pick. Price rises with team demand (20k–200k tokens). Approve {tokenSymbol}, then mint.
en.mint.summaryPending: Enter a mint amount to see the token cost.
en.mint.estimateNote: On-chain unit price is still loading; amount below uses the pricing curve estimate.
en.mint.noneSelected: Tap a flag to choose your nation
en.claim.title: Claim reward
en.claim.hint: After settlement: non-champion NFTs claim a one-time participant-pool share; champion NFTs claim champion-pool shares and may claim multiple times.
en.claim.championNote: Use Claim all for transfer pending balance (≤{max} stamps). Use batch claim when you hold more than {max} stamps.
en.claim.notFinalized: Rewards unlock only after the final result is settled on-chain.
en.claim.batchHint: Batch claim #{start}–{end} of {total} stamps (max {max} per tx). Run again until finished, then use Claim all for any transfer pending balance.
en.claim.batchLargeOnly: Use batch claim when you hold more than {max} NFTs.
en.claim.allHint: Claim all settles rewards for every stamp (recommended for ≤{max} stamps).
en.settlement.intro: After the final, once FLAP WorldCupViewer publishes the champion, anyone can call freeze to settle the prize pool on-chain.
en.settlement.after: After settlement, rewards are available to claim. Use Claim rewards above.
en.settlement.waitDeadline: Settlement opens after the mint deadline (one hour before the final).
en.settlement.viewerPending: WorldCupViewer has not published the final result yet. freeze is not available.
en.settlement.done: The vault is settled. Dividends are now available to claim.
en.market.title: 48-nation board
en.market.empty: No nations match the current filter.
en.pools.title: Prize pool overview
en.pools.championNote: Champion-pool shares for winning-team stamps; claimable multiple times after settlement.
en.pools.participantNote: One-time participant-pool payout for non-champion stamps after settlement.
en.holdings.title: My holdings
en.holdings.connect: Connect your wallet to view personal stamp stats.
en.deflation.title: Deflation stats
en.deflation.milestoneNote: Mint burns 100% of spend; 10% NFT royalty is buyback-burned.
en.deflation.buybackNote: Anyone can call buybackAndBurn to swap royalty-pool BNB for WC26 and send it to the burn address. Executed buybacks count toward royalty burn above.
en.notices.switchNetwork: Switch to {requiredChain} to interact with WorldCupVault.
en.notices.mintFrozen: The vault is settled. Stamp minting is closed on-chain.
en.notices.mintClosed: The mint deadline has passed. Stamp minting is closed on-chain.
en.notices.priceUnavailable: On-chain unit price is not available yet. You can approve the token first; the contract will charge the live price when minting.
en.errors.stageUnavailable: This action is not available in the current market phase.
en.errors.mintFrozen: The vault is frozen. Stamp minting is no longer available.
en.errors.claimUnavailable: No BNB rewards available to claim.
en.errors.claimNotFrozen: The final result is not settled yet. Rewards are not available to claim.
en.errors.freezeTooEarly: Minting has not closed yet. Wait until after the mint deadline.
en.errors.freezeViewerPending: WorldCupViewer has not published the final result yet.
en.errors.claimBatchDone: All stamp batches are claimed. Use Claim all for any transfer pending balance.
en.errors.mintSimulationFailed: Mint simulation failed. Approve enough {tokenSymbol}, stay on BSC, and ensure the nation has an on-chain unit price.
en.errors.batchTooLarge: Batch mint supports at most {max} stamps per transaction.
en.messages.claimBatchSuccess: Batch {start}–{end} of {total} claimed. Continue with the next batch if needed.
en.messages.freezeSuccess: Pool settled successfully. You can claim rewards now.

zh.title: 世界杯 NFT
zh.subtitle: 世界杯NFT链上预测协议
zh.intro.overview: 围绕 48 支参赛国家队，任何人都可以铸造 NFT 押注章 Stake Stamp，锁定自己看好的冠军之选。这张 NFT 既是纪念藏品，也是决赛后的分红凭证，同时可以在 NFT 市场自由交易。官方Dapp：worldcupnft.club
zh.intro.pricing: 起步价 2 万代币/张，不限发行量；同一支队伍铸造人数越多，该队 NFT 价格越高，最高封顶 20 万代币。
zh.intro.deflation: 铸造花费的代币 100% 销毁；NFT 二级市场交易产生的 10% 版税，也全部用于回购并销毁代币。
zh.intro.settlement: FLAP WorldCupViewer 决赛结果结算完成后：未押中冠军的 NFT 领取参与池份额；押中冠军的 NFT 领取冠军池份额。
zh.flywheel.headline: 飞轮拆解：项目越火，价值越涨
zh.flywheel.intro: 把铸造、销毁、赛事进程、二级市场全部串起来看，你会发现这是一台正向循环的飞轮：
zh.flywheel.mintBurnLabel: 无限铸造 = 无限销毁
zh.flywheel.mintBurn: 铸造没有上限，意味着对 {tokenSymbol} 的消耗也没有上限。每多一张 NFT 被铸造，就有一笔代币被永久销毁，流通盘持续收紧。
zh.flywheel.eliminationLabel: 小组赛淘汰 = 新一轮买盘
zh.flywheel.elimination: 每当一支球队被淘汰，资金和注意力会迅速转向仍在晋级的队伍。想铸造新队伍？必须先买 {tokenSymbol}。一轮比赛 = 一波新买单，世界杯越火、参与者越多，飞轮转得越快。
zh.flywheel.secondaryLabel: NFT 二级市场随时止盈
zh.flywheel.secondary: 举个例子：你用 5 万 {tokenSymbol} 铸造了阿根廷，后来热度被推到 17 万，但你对它的赛况没信心了——这时你可以直接在 NFT 市场挂一个你认为合理的价格卖出，换回 BNB，提前锁定收益，不必等到决赛。
zh.flywheel.floor: 就算最终押错队伍，保底奖池仍按持仓比例派发，下行风险被显著压缩。
zh.flywheel.momentum: 世界杯热度 + 持续销毁 + 不断进场的新资金，三股力量共同推动 {tokenSymbol} 价值走高——而你手里的每一张 NFT，都是同时押注「球队」和「项目本身」的双重资产。
zh.mint.title: 铸造NFT押注章
zh.mint.banner: 铸造NFT押注章。同一国家队铸造越多单价越高（2 万–20 万代币）。授权 {tokenSymbol} 后一键铸造。
zh.mint.costSummary: 消耗 {tokenAmount} {tokenSymbol}，铸造 {count} 张押注章
zh.mint.summaryPending: 请输入铸造数量，系统将显示需消耗的代币
zh.mint.estimateNote: 链上单价读取中，以下为价格曲线预估
zh.claim.title: 领取奖金
zh.claim.hint: FLAP WorldCupViewer 决赛结果结算完成后：未押中冠军的 NFT 领取参与池份额；押中冠军的 NFT 领取冠军池份额。
zh.claim.championNote: 转出冠军 NFT 的挂账请用「一键领取」（持有 ≤{max} 张）；超过 {max} 张请用「分批领取」。
zh.claim.notFinalized: 奖池在决赛结果结算完成后方可领取。
zh.claim.batchHint: 分批领取第 {start}–{end} 张，共 {total} 张（单次最多 {max} 张）。全部批次领完后，如有转出挂账请再点「一键领取」。
zh.claim.batchLargeOnly: 持有超过 {max} 张 NFT 时可使用分批领取。
zh.claim.allHint: 一键领取会结算全部 NFT 奖励（持有 ≤{max} 张时推荐）。
zh.settlement.intro: 决赛结束、铸造截止后，FLAP WorldCupViewer 公布冠军结果后，任何人都可以触发结算按钮完成奖池结算。
zh.settlement.after: 结算完成后：方可领取奖池，请在上方的「领取奖金」操作。
zh.settlement.waitDeadline: 铸造截止后方可结算（决赛前 1 小时截止铸造）。
zh.settlement.viewerPending: WorldCupViewer 尚未公布决赛结果，暂无法结算。
zh.settlement.done: 金库已结算，分红已开放领取。
zh.market.title: 48 国行情看板
zh.market.empty: 当前筛选条件下没有匹配的国家
zh.pools.title: 奖池概览
zh.pools.championNote: 押中冠军国家的 NFT 在结算后领取冠军池份额。
zh.pools.participantNote: 未押中冠军的 NFT 在结算后领取参与池份额。
zh.pools.royaltyNote: 二级市场 10% 版税用于回购销毁。（与代币交易买卖税无关）
zh.holdings.title: 我的持仓
zh.holdings.connect: 连接钱包后查看个人押注数据。
zh.deflation.title: 通缩数据
zh.deflation.milestoneNote: 铸造 100% 销毁；NFT 版税 10% 回购销毁。
zh.deflation.buybackNote: 版税池 BNB 可由任何人调用 buybackAndBurn 在市场上回购代币，并打入销毁地址；已执行的回购会计入上方版税销毁。
zh.notices.switchNetwork: 请切换到 {requiredChain} 后再操作 WorldCupVault。
zh.notices.mintFrozen: 金库已结算，链上铸造入口已关闭。
zh.notices.mintClosed: 铸造截止时间已过，链上无法再 mint。
zh.notices.priceUnavailable: 链上暂未读到该队单价。可先授权代币，铸造时由合约按实时价格扣款。
zh.errors.stageUnavailable: 当前市场阶段不可用此操作。
zh.errors.mintFrozen: 金库已 freeze，铸造已关闭。
zh.errors.amountRequired: 请输入有效的铸造数量。
zh.errors.claimUnavailable: 暂无可领取的 BNB 奖励。
zh.errors.claimNotFrozen: 决赛结果尚未结算，暂不可领取。
zh.errors.freezeTooEarly: 铸造尚未截止，请等待 mint 截止后再结算。
zh.errors.freezeViewerPending: WorldCupViewer 尚未公布决赛结果。
zh.errors.claimBatchDone: NFT 批次已全部领取完毕；如有转出挂账请使用「一键领取」。
zh.errors.mintSimulationFailed: 铸造预检失败：请确认已授权足够的 {tokenSymbol}、钱包在 BSC 主网，且所选国家能读到链上单价后再试。
zh.errors.batchTooLarge: 单次批量铸造最多 {max} 张。
zh.messages.claimBatchSuccess: 已领取第 {start}–{end} 张（共 {total} 张），如仍有剩余请继续分批领取。
zh.messages.freezeSuccess: 奖池结算成功，现在可以领取分红。
